hero.title: Designed to disappear into your life.
hero.subtitle: Carefully selected technology for your home, your journeys and everything in between. European shipping, considered design, no noise.

home.promiseBody: Every product at Tulsi passes one test: would we keep it on our own desk, in our own home, in our own bag? If not, we don't sell it.
home.warrantyBody: European consumer protection, honoured without friction.
home.returnsBody: Changed your mind? Send it back.

product.shipEU: Free shipping from our EU warehouse · 4–8 days

cart.title: Your cart
cart.note: Shipping and taxes are calculated at checkout. We accept cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, iDEAL, Bancontact and PayPal.

order.successBody: Your order is confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way, and we'll send tracking as soon as it ships.

footer.tagline: Premium everyday technology, shipped across Europe.

notFound.title: This page took a wrong turn.
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
